build.beforeBuildCommand: npm run sidecar:prepare && npm run build:tauri

security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:* http://localhost:* ws://127.0.0.1:* ws://localhost:* ipc: tauri:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: https:; font-src 'self' https: data:
